Event: Cornucopia Island May 2025
Event Date: 19/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T112
Mushroom King Totem

Once in a while the unit removes 2 random buffs from 3 nearby enemies and deals 400000 magic damage to them. The targets also can't recover health for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
